description: Refactor the SocialApp layout to use dimension resources and implement responsive design for tablets. Extract hardcoded values from 'app/src/main/res/layout/activity_profile.xml' into 'app/src/main/res/values/dimens.xml' using semantic names. Create a tablet-specific resource file in 'app/src/main/res/values-sw600dp/dimens.xml' with increased dimension values to optimize the layout for larger screens. Update the original layout file to reference these dimension resources and verify the project builds successfully.
